regulatory_policy.content: We are pleased to announce the new Digital Data Protection Rules 2026. These rules aim to safeguard citizen data while fostering innovation. Full details: [link] #DigitalIndia #DataProtection
We've reviewed the new data protection rules and while we support the intent, several provisions could significantly impact startup operations. We're preparing a detailed response. Thread below
Finally! The data protection rules are a step in the right direction, but they don't go far enough. Here's what's missing and why it matters for every Indian internet user:
Can someone explain what these new data rules mean for normal people? Will apps still track everything we do?

stock_market_event.content: BREAKING: Sensex drops 800 points in morning trade amid global sell-off. IT stocks leading the decline. Nifty tests key support at 22,000. Live updates below.
Portfolio down 5% today. Should have taken profits last week. Anyone else holding or panic selling?
Correction was overdue. Current valuations were stretched. This is healthy consolidation. My key levels to watch: Nifty 21,800 support, 22,500 resistance. Don't panic, stay systematic.

election_campaign.content: Historic rally today! Over 50,000 people came to hear our leader speak. The wave is real. Change is coming! #Election2026

FACT CHECK: Viral claim that [Party X] promised free laptops to all students is MISLEADING. The actual promise was subsidized tablets for government school students only. Source: official manifesto page 47.
